differentialBuckets.label: Key thresholds and interpretation caveats: TSH typical adult range about 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; use local lab, pregnancy, and illness context. Free T4 typical adult range about 0.8-1.8 ng/dL; use local assay.

differentialBuckets.action: Use local assay and patient context; do not apply numeric anchors without clinical interpretation.

redFlags.label: Thyroid storm, vision-threatening orbitopathy, pregnancy with uncontrolled hyperthyroidism.

source.source_section: Graves' Disease generated endocrine workup: diagnostic workup

initialTests.action: Interpret with local lab ranges. Reference anchors: TSH typical adult range about 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; use local lab, pregnancy, and illness context. Free T4 typical adult range about 0.8-1.8 ng/dL; use local assay. T3, TRAb/TSI, TPO Ab, and thyroglobulin Ab are assay-specific.
